candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line, not a reported current assets total.

candidates.row_label: Adjustments for losses (gains) on disposal of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, unrelated to current assets total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over restricted cash and cash flow carryover lines.

candidates.row_label: Current restricted cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Restricted cash should not be used for CHE when an unrestricted cash line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance matches, but balance sheet line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not period-end balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents before effect of exchange rate changes
candidates.why: Change in cash, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX effect, not cash balance.
Cash flow movement, not cash balance.
Interest line, not cash balance.
Interest paid, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Use the balance-sheet cash balance, excluding restricted cash.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component/subtotal wording, not total current liabilities.
Cash flow working-capital line, not balance sheet total.
Balancing line, not preferred when total exists.
Balancing line, not preferred when total exists.
Non-current liabilities, wrong category.
Non-current liabilities, wrong category.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term debt/current maturities of long-term debt; excludes leases.
Can represent short-term borrowings if used, but may be separate or zero; secondary component only if needed.
Also a strong semantic match for current debt maturities, but appears more supplemental than primary reported line here.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet short-term debt balance.

variables.notes: Selected the cleanest current-debt label from the balance sheet shortlist. Excluded lease-related lines. Did not add Bank Overdraft to avoid possible double counting and because no clear evidence it is needed in addition to the current portion line.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct match for PPE total/net balance; preferred over lease-related gross/accumulated depreciation rows and cash flow capex lines.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related gross asset component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset for lease assets, not PPE total.
Capex cash flow, not balance sheet PPE stock.
Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities; preferred reported total.

candidates.row_label: Net cash from/used (-) in operating activites
candidates.why: Also a direct operating cash flow label, likely used in another period layout; good alternative.

candidates.row_label: Other Operating Cash Flow - Pension related
candidates.why: Operating cash flow component only, not the total.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flows from (used in) operating activities
Net cash from/used (-) in operating activites

variables.notes: Chose the reported operating cash flow total labels as a priority list. Included the alternate wording because labels appear to vary over time.
